# Garaad — Somalia's Freelancing & Tech Education Platform
# https://garaad.org
# llms.txt — machine-readable site overview for AI crawlers

## About Garaad

Garaad is Somalia's first Somali-language platform for freelancing education and digital skills training.
We teach Somali speakers how to earn money online through freelancing (Upwork, Fiverr), copywriting,
graphic design, programming, and AI skills — all in the Somali language (Af-Soomaali).

**Language**: Somali (Af-Soomaali) with English technical terminology
**Audience**: Somali-speaking learners in Somalia, Kenya, Ethiopia, UK, Ireland, USA, and Scandinavia
**Mission**: Enable every Somali speaker to earn an income online through digital skills

## Key Topics Covered

- Freelancing for beginners (lacag online, shaqo online)
- How to use Upwork (Upwork Soomaali)
- How to use Fiverr (Fiverr Soomaali)
- Copywriting in Somali (copywriting Soomaali)
- Graphic Design in Somali (graphic design Soomaali, naqshadeynta dijital)
- Remote jobs for Somalis (shaqo remote Soomaali)
- High-income digital skills (xirfadaha lacagta leh online)
- How to earn money online in Somali (lacag online Soomaali)
- Programming / Web Development in Somali (baro coding Soomaali)
- AI skills for Somalis (AI xirfado Soomaali)

## Primary Learning Tracks

- **Bilow Freelancing** (Start Freelancing): 5-week beginner track
  URL: https://garaad.org/courses/freelancing
- **Full-Stack Development**: Learn React, Next.js, Node.js in Somali
- **AI Fundamentals**: AI tools and automation for beginners

## Somali Keyword Reference

| Somali Term | English Meaning |
|---|---|
| lacag online | earn money online |
| shaqo online | online work / online job |
| xirfadaha dijital | digital skills |
| bilow freelancing | start freelancing |
| baro coding | learn coding |
| qoraalka iibsiga | copywriting |
| naqshadeynta dijital | digital design |
| shaqo remote | remote work |
| macmiil | client |
| cashar | lesson |
| koorso | course |

## Content Architecture

- /courses — all learning tracks
- /courses/freelancing — freelancing track hub
- /learn — Somali-language educational articles
- /learn/[slug] — individual topic guides (e.g. sida-loo-bilaabo-freelancing-soomaali)
- /blog — Somali-language blog posts
- /blog/[slug] — individual blog posts
- /about — about Garaad

## Instructional Philosophy

All lessons follow an answer-first format:
1. Direct answer to the search intent
2. Practical step-by-step guidance
3. Real examples relevant to Somali context
4. Free lesson access to try before paying

## Contact & Social

- Website: https://garaad.org
- Email: Info@garaad.org
- Twitter/X: @Garaadstem
- Facebook: facebook.com/Garaadstem

## Crawler Permissions

All AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, ChatGPT-User, PerplexityBot, Googlebot, etc.) are permitted
to index all public pages. See https://garaad.org/robots.txt for full rules.
